scheme_name: Samagra Samajik Suraksha Vridhavastha Pension Yojana
page_title: Samagra Samajik Suraksha Vridhavastha Pension Yojana

details: Samagra Samajik Suraksha Vridhavastha Pension Yojana, under the Department of Social Justice and Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, the government of Madhya Pradesh. provides Pensions are sanctioned to provide social security to old destitute people. Under this, such destitute elderly people who cannot support themselves are benefited.
eligibility: The applicant should be a native of Madhya Pradesh.
The applicant age should be more than 60 years.
The name should be mentioned on the Samagra portal.

online: Applicants can apply for the scheme using the prescribed format and submitting the necessary documents either to the designated officer's office, the Gram Panchayat, or a Public Service Center.
Upon submitting a complete application, the applicant will receive a mandatory acknowledgment from the office.
: The District Panchayat/Gram Panchayat/Urban Body/Ward Office will scrutinize the documents submitted with the application.
: If, after investigation, the documents are found to be incorrect according to the rules, the application will be rejected with written explanation.
: If, after investigation, the documents are found to be correct, the pension case will be approved according to the rules.

Once the pension is approved, the beneficiary's name will be added to the pension proposal for the current month by the District Panchayat/Gram Panchayat/Urban Body/Ward Office. The approved order will be maintained on record.
: The Directorate will deposit the monthly pension amount directly into the beneficiary's bank savings account through a single click, starting from the same month the approval is granted.

faqs.question: What is the objective of the scheme?
faqs.answer: Under the scheme, Pensions are sanctioned to provide social security to old destitute people. Under this, such destitute elderly people who cannot support themselves are benefited.

faqs.question: What is the financial benefit amount ?
Is the benefit amount given every month?
faqs.answer: Yes, benefit amount will be provided every month.

faqs.question: Is this scheme benefit only for Madhya Pradesh State?
faqs.answer: Yes, only for Madhya Pradesh citizens.

faqs.question: How can applicant apply online?
faqs.answer: Go to the Samajik Suraksha portal https://socialsecurity.mp.gov.in/Home.aspx. and follow the steps given in the scheme.

faqs.question: How can applicant apply offline?
faqs.answer: 1. Applicants have to visit the Gram Panchayat / Janpad Panchayat in rural areas and Municipal Corporation / Municipality / City Council in urban areas. 2. Get the application form and fill it with the required information. 3. Attach the necessary document. 4. Get the acknowledgement from the concerned office.

faqs.question: What documents are required while submitting the application form?
faqs.answer: 1. Three photos of beneficiary. 2. Destitute certificate. 3. Certificate to confirm age. 4. Nine Digit Samagra ID.

faqs.question: What is Samagra I.D.?
faqs.answer: SAMAGRA ID card is Provided by the State Government of Madhya Pradesh under SAMAGRA Portal to all permanent residents of MP to avail various benefits given by the Madhya Pradesh state Government.

faqs.question: Is there any age limits for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Yes, only the Person's age should be more than 60 years.
